Opportunities
Home News Team Publication Opportunities About

Work with us on secure, private, and dependable AI systems.

PhD Open

PhD Students in Privacy and Secure Machine Learning

We welcome enquiries from students interested in privacy-preserving machine learning and cyber security.

Deadline
Applications reviewed on a rolling basis
Discuss a PhD project →
Visiting / Internship Enquiries welcome

Visiting Students and Research Interns

Students interested in our research are welcome to propose a focused research visit.

Deadline
Contact us at least six months before your proposed visit
Send an enquiry →
Collaboration Open

Research Collaborations

We welcome academic and industry collaborations on AI security, privacy auditing, synthetic data, and unknown risks in deployed AI systems.

Deadline
No fixed deadline
Contact the lab →
